## Describe the bug

A clear description of what went wrong.

## To reproduce

1. Run `bumpcraft ...`
2. With this config: `...`
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include any error messages or output.

## Environment

- Bumpcraft version: (run `bumpcraft --version`)
- Node.js version: (run `node --version`)
- OS: (e.g., Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 24.04)
- Git version: (run `git --version`)

## Additional context

Any other relevant info (config file, commit history, screenshots).
